debug_info.goal:
ι : Type u_1
Ω : Type u_2
m : MeasurableSpace Ω
X : Ω → Set ι
u : Set ι
i j : ι
p : ↑unitInterval
P : Measure Ω
hX : @ProbabilityTheory.IsBernoulliOn ι Ω m X u p P
hi : i ∈ u
hj : j ∈ u
⊢ map (fun ω => i ∈ X ω) P = map (fun ω => j ∈ X ω) P

verification_message: All 1 attempts failed (1 strategies x 1 attempts each)
proof_attempts:
by
    classical
    have hlaw : Measure.map X P = Ber(u, p) := hX
    have hmem (k : ι) (hk : k ∈ u) :
        Measure.map (fun ω => k ∈ X ω) P =
          (toNNReal p • dirac True + toNNReal (σ p) • dirac False) := by
      calc
        Measure.map (fun ω => k ∈ X ω) P
            = Measure.map (fun s : Set ι => k ∈ s) (Measure.map X P) := by
                simpa [Function.comp] using
                  (Measure.map_map (μ := P) (f := X) (g := fun s : Set ι => k ∈ s)).symm
        _ = Measure.map (fun s : Set ι => k ∈ s) (Ber(u, p)) := by simpa [hlaw]
        _ = Measure.map (fun f : ι → Prop => f k)
              (infinitePi fun a ↦ toNNReal p • dirac (a ∈ u) + toNNReal (σ p) • dirac False) := by
              simp [bernoulliOn_eq_map (u := u) (p := p), Measure.map_map, Function.comp]
        _ = toNNReal p • dirac (k ∈ u) + toNNReal (σ p) • dirac False := by
              simpa using
                (Measure.map_infinitePi_eval
                  (μ := fun a ↦ toNNReal p • dirac (a ∈ u) + toNNReal (σ p) • dirac False) k)
        _ = toNNReal p • dirac True + toNNReal (σ p) • dirac False := by simp [hk]
    simpa [hmem i hi, hmem j hj]
